rationale: The 2020 paper appears to cite Naik and Raman (2003) only as a brief benchmark example of prior optimal advertising work that implies relatively constant spending. The citation is used in passing to contrast with observed time variation in spending, not to build the paper's core model, hypotheses, estimation, or interpretation around that specific study. There is no sustained discussion of the cited paper's multimedia-synergy framework or direct methodological reuse tied to it.
